description: Estimate the annual solar energy production for a residential client in Phoenix, AZ (Zip Code 85001) using the NREL PVWatts Calculator (https://pvwatts.nrel.gov/). Use the following system parameters: 8 kW DC system size, Premium module type, Fixed Roof Mount array type, 14% system losses, 18 degrees tilt, and 180 degrees azimuth. Bookmark the results page in a folder named 'Client Estimates' and download the hourly results CSV to the Downloads folder. Create a report at ~/Documents/solar_production_report.txt containing the Yearly AC Energy Output value.
